val_command: cp ../../../ml_tasks/Representation_Learning_lightly/original_file_backup/models/utils.py ./lightly/models/ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Representation_Learning_lightly/original_file_backup/transforms/utils.py ./lightly/transforms/ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Representation_Learning_lightly/train_eval_baseline.py ./ && python train_eval_baseline.py --split val
